citations.claim: The component is a Next.js TypeScript package with React 19 and comprehensive dependencies for chat, payments, and encryption
The application uses a provider-based architecture with authentication, theme, verification mode, and telemetry providers
The main chat page implements streaming chat with state management, authentication checks, and model loading
The API client supports optional end-to-end encryption using X25519/NaCl box with coordinator key management
Request sealing uses ephemeral X25519 keypairs and NaCl box encryption for forward secrecy
Authentication uses Privy for email login with automatic API key provisioning from the coordinator
State management uses Zustand with persistence middleware for chat history and preferences
Hardware verification fetches Apple certificate chains and performs X.509 validation against Apple Root CA
Provider dashboard fetches machine status and earnings data from the coordinator API
Billing system integrates with Stripe for payments and coordinator for balance/usage tracking
API routes proxy requests to the coordinator while preserving streaming and encryption headers
Telemetry system batches events with debouncing and uses sendBeacon for reliable delivery
AppShell provides the main layout with sidebar navigation and toast notification system
Chat flow implements streaming with trust metadata, performance metrics, and error handling
Streaming chat handles sealed responses with SSE event decryption and think-block parsing
Trust badges display hardware attestation levels with Apple MDA verification status
Next.js configuration handles TypeScript build issues with viem dependency tree
Models API flattens metadata and processes attestation information for UI display
Authentication route provisions API keys using Privy tokens or Authorization headers
Coordinator key caching uses URL-keyed storage with 1-hour TTL and rotation handling
